creator: netilesik@gmail.com
text:
After a day or more of uptime this happens:
(System not very busy. general LA is 0.5-0.8,  14 jails) 


Fatal trap 9 general protection fault while in kernel mode
cpuid = 1; acpi id = 01
instruction pointer = 0x20:0xffffffff8062fbd7
stack pointer = 0x28:0xffffff8078139550
frame pointer = 0x28:0xffffff80781395c0
code segment = base 0x0. limit 0xfffff. type Qx1b
 DPL Q. pres 1. long 1. def3Z 0. gran 1

processor eflags = interrupt enabled. resume. IOPL = 0
current process = 98732 (postmap)
trap number = 9
panic: general protection fault
cpuid = 1
Uptime: 1d19h41m34s
Cannot dump. Device not defined or unavailable.
Automatic reboot in 15 seconds - press a key on the console to abort


..
and it didnt reboots after 15 sec. only hard reset helps.
If any more info requred to help solve this problem - just ask, and I will provide.


DMESG:(just after reboot)
